title: heliconia montana
intro: Heliconia montana, also known as the mountain lobster claw or false bird of paradise, is a species of flowering plant in the family Heliconiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The health benefits of Heliconia montana include its ability to aid in the treatment of colds and flu, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Heliconia montana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to soothe coughs and sore throats.
